crime.value: Murder of Angelina Norton in library, possibly connected to historical case she was researching
crime.quote: I saw the man come all the way into the room kneel down beside's Angelina and sniffed her dead body

victim.value: Angelina Norton, researcher investigating wrongful execution case of Gregory Pollicatius
victim.quote: Sat at her desk, Angelina Norton was studying a file for an old murder case, for her next book

closed_world.value: Library after closing time with locked doors and blocked communication
closed_world.quote: Looking around Angelina noticed that the lights had gone out. "Damn," she thought, "Patty must have forgotten"

culprit_and_motive.value: Mr. Pollicatius (presumably Gregory or related) seeking revenge/silencing researcher
culprit_and_motive.quote: Mr. Pollicatius was standing over her with his hand wrapped around her hair

investigator.value: Patty Cross as witness/survivor perspective, no formal detective present
investigator.quote: Patty started to gag and close her eyes when she felt someone wrap their hand in her hair

suspect_architecture.value: Primary suspect: Mr. Pollicatius (supposedly executed in 1960, now returned); accomplice described as dirt-covered man who displays necrophilic behavior
suspect_architecture.quote: Mr. Pollicatius was standing over her with his hand wrapped around her hair

red_herring.value: The historical case suggests Pollicatius was wrongly executed for circumstantial evidence, implying supernatural return rather than survival
red_herring.quote: electrocuted for a double murder in 1960, all evidence was circumstantial as no bodies were found

clue_fairness.value: Time sheet evidence from 1960 case presented to reader; current library setting mirrors original crime location
clue_fairness.quote: the only evidence against him, was a time sheet stamped a few minutes before the library closed

social_world.value: 1960s Detroit anti-immigrant prejudice against Polish workers; economic desperation creating scapegoating of foreigners
social_world.quote: Being Polish and in Detroit in the 60s, meant too many bad feelings, so it was no surprise when the jury took only

alibi.value: Pollicatius's original alibi was electrical work in the library, which became evidence against him rather than exoneration
alibi.quote: electrician by trade, which he was doing some re-wiring, which is why he was in the library that fated night

media_and_audience.value: Historical case shaped by anti-immigrant sentiment and economic anxiety; Angelina researching for true crime book publication
media_and_audience.quote: Going through the old files it was obvious this was just another way of getting back at those foreigners

investigator_wound.value: Angelina Norton investigating a case of likely wrongful execution, making her vulnerable to the returned victim of injustice
investigator_wound.quote: Angelina Norton was studying a file for an old murder case, for her next book

_meta.title: ebook kimba sue the killer at the library
